context.goal: Establish a stable post-reset baseline before functional checking.
stimulus_intent: Assert the detected reset using the inferred polarity.
Release reset conservatively and observe interface stabilization.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.

timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.

context.goal: Verify that the module asserts valid_out for a single cycle after accumulating four valid inputs and that data_out reflects the correct sum.
stimulus_intent: Drive a sequence of four consecutive cycles with valid_in=1 and varying data_in, then observe valid_out and data_out.
timing_assumptions: Observe over multiple clock cycles; do not assume fixed latency beyond the requirement that valid_out appears after the fourth input.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Confirm that inputs presented while valid_in is low are ignored by the accumulator.
stimulus_intent: Toggle valid_in low for several cycles while varying data_in, then assert valid_in high for four cycles and verify accumulation does not include ignored values.
timing_assumptions: Conservative observation across clock cycles.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Stress test with non‑deterministic valid_in patterns to ensure consistent accumulation behavior.
stimulus_intent: Generate a pseudo‑random stream of valid_in (0/1) and data_in values, ensuring at least four valid samples occur periodically.
timing_assumptions: Observe over an extended number of cycles; no fixed‑latency assumptions are made.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Demonstrate that accumulation is commutative as expected for addition.
stimulus_intent: Apply four valid inputs in one order, capture data_out, then apply the same four values in a different order and verify data_out matches.
timing_assumptions: Conservative observation; compare outputs after each valid_out pulse.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.

generated_files.description: Marks the rendered cocotb test directory as a Python package.
Conservative DUT interface helpers derived from the contract artifact.
Thin environment wrapper that composes interface, timing-safe waits, and coverage helpers.
Structured oracle helper functions rendered from the oracle artifact.
Stable runtime helpers exposed to LLM-filled stimulus and oracle TODO blocks.
Coverage scaffold rendered from plan coverage tags for later execution stages.
Rendered basic cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Rendered protocol cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Rendered edge cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Phase 4 executable Makefile shell; Phase 5 injects run-time variables and executes it.
